title: SHELTERING ANIMALS AND FAMILIES TOGETHER - 211info
text: KLAMATH ADVOCACY CENTER SHELTERING ANIMALS AND FAMILIES TOGETHER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a safe place to stay for the pets of eligible individuals. Animals allowed to stay in shelter with victims when space is available. Confidential Address Eligibility: Pets of individuals who are survivors of domestic violence, sexual assault, dating violence, or stalking Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 850-8939 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 850-8939 Helpline (541) 884-0390 24/7 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Klamath County Services: Foster Care/Temporary Shelter for Animals Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - KLAMATH ADVOCACY CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH ADVOCACY CENTER
